evals.name: Check standard execution
evals.prompt: Run the standard flow for vss-generate-video-report
evals.expected_output: The skill runs the standard flow for vss-generate-video-report successfully and produces expected outputs.

evals.name: Check custom options and parameters
evals.prompt: Run vss-generate-video-report with custom parameters and options
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the custom parameters and executes the vss-generate-video-report workflow accordingly.

evals.name: Check error/invalid input negative case
evals.prompt: Run vss-generate-video-report with invalid input parameters to trigger expected error handling
evals.expected_output: The skill gracefully rejects the invalid input or reports a clear error message.
